title: JEE Main 2025 Session 2 Exam Date (Out) @ jeemain.nta.nic.in National Testing Agency

detail.title: JEE Main 2025 Session 2 Exam Date (Out) @ jeemain.nta.nic.in National Testing Agency
detail.short_info: National Testing Agency has released the JEE Main 2025 Session 2. Students can access their NTA Exam Date 2025 using their registration number through the direct link here.

sections.heading: JEE Main 2025 Session 2 Exam Date (Out) @ jeemain.nta.nic.in National Testing Agency

content.text: National Testing Agency officials have released National Testing Agency Exam Exam Date. Furthermore, the NTA Exam Date for JEE Main 2025 Session 2 was announced 02-04-2025 to 09-04-2025 by the administration.

National Testing Agency Exam Schedule 2025 may be found by clicking on the link at the bottom of the page. All candidates should keep in mind that as National Testing Agency Sem Exam Exam Date is released, we will update the links.
Check - JEE Main 2025 Session 2 Exam Date

sections.heading: Important Details JEE Main 2025 Session 2 Exam Date

rows: Joint Entrance Examination Main 2025 Session II

sections.heading: How to Download the JEE Main 2025 Session 2 Exam Date?

content.text: Candidates follow the steps to download National Testing Agency Exam Date, candidates check the details and download it easily.

items: The examination Schedules page will pop up
Exam Date for different courses will show up for Regular and Regular / External.
